scripts.start:electron: cd electron && wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm start
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:prepare
scripts.build:prepare: npm run copy:backend && npm run copy:frontend
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build
scripts.copy:backend: cp -r backend electron/backend && cd electron/backend && npm install --production
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:electron"
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
